title: thalictrum majus subsp. billotii
intro: Thalictrum majus subsp. billotii, commonly known as large meadow rue, is a flowering plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing skin irritations. Large meadow rue can be used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
